title: Internal error in internal cell is found in case when use "insbuf -buf" command

features.name: shift register with left shift operator
features.description: Code should include an 8-bit register that shifts left by 1 bit on each clock edge, using the << operator inside a synchronous always block

features.name: bit-select assignment to shift register LSB
features.description: Code should include a bit-select assignment targeting the LSB of a multi-bit register inside a synchronous always block, feeding a serial input into a shift register

features.name: undriven output port
features.description: Code should include an output port that is declared but never assigned any value, resulting in an undriven wire that may carry undefined or high-impedance state
